heading: Transportation of deceased veteran to a national cemetery or a covered veterans’ cemetery
label: 2308 Transportation of deceased veteran to a national cemetery or a covered veterans’ cemetery

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary may pay, in addition to any amount paid pursuant to regarding veterans described in subparagraph (B) or (C) of subsection (a)(2) of such section, or pursuant to , the cost of transportation of the deceased veteran described in subsection (b) for burial in a national cemetery or a covered veterans’ cemetery. Such payment shall not exceed the cost of transportation to the national cemetery nearest the veteran’s last place of residence in which burial space is available.section 2303 of this titlesection 2307 of this title
A veteran who dies as the result of a service-connected disability.
A veteran who dies while in receipt of disability compensation (or who but for the receipt of retirement pay or pension under this title, would have been entitled to compensation).

A veteran whom the Secretary determines is eligible for funeral expenses under by virtue of the Secretary determining that the veteran has no next of kin or other person claiming the body of such veteran pursuant to subsection (a)(2)(C) of such section.section 2303 of this title
in which a deceased veteran described in subsection (b) is eligible to be buried;

children.label: A
children.text: is owned by a State; or

children.label: B
children.text: is on trust land owned by, or held in trust for, a tribal organization; and
for which the Secretary has made a grant under .section 2408 of this title
